name: The Mirum
short_description: A puzzle game with a surrealistic fairy-tale atmosphere.
detailed_description:
This is a first person puzzle game.

Story

A mad mage has created his own pocket dimension and imprisoned people in it to absorb their mental powers. A lonely seeker tries to return to his native reality, but to do so he must solve the tricky puzzles.

Gameplay

You will have to solve various puzzles in 3D space playing from the first-person perspective. There are no combat in the game, relax and solve the puzzles.

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
